title: The First City ($50,000 MrBeast Mod)
description: Discover the secret behind the ancient city's demise...
body:
## **PLEASE DO NOT ADD THIS MOD TO YOUR SMP! It is intended to be played through a single time on a new world, using only the required dependencies.**

Ever wonder what lies beyond the Ancient City's portal? This mod adds a new pedestal right in front of the Ancient City's portal, in the city center. Activating the pedestal requires a Warden's Key, which can be obtained by killing a Warden. But be careful — once opened, the portal cannot be closed. # How to play **This mod requires Geckolib, Cloth Config, and Fabric API.** You can also try using [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) for better performance, but sometimes they can cause rendering issues, in which case you'll have to play without them. **DO NOT ADD ANY OTHER MODS, AT ALL, OR ELSE YOU WILL HAVE PROBLEMS!** Playing this mod properly requires a number of specific settings: **Server-side settings (in server.properties, if playing on a server):** - Simulation distance of 32 - View distance of 32 - allow-flight=true **Game rules:** - /gamerule doImmediateRespawn true - /gamerule keepInventory true **Client settings:** - Use Fancy graphics (*not* Fabulous) - 32 render distance - 32 simulation distance - Disable view bobbing We are aware many people will not be able to use 32 render/simulation distance for performance reasons. You can try to set it lower, but you may experience some bugs. You **cannot** set it below 16, or else you will have major rendering issues. **Other notes:** - Give all players diamond armor, sword, and food. Can use worse gear for a bigger challenge. - No pickaxes/mining! We made this mod for a video for MrBeast & friends. As such, there may be some bugs and unexpected behaviors. For the best experience, if playing in a group, try to have all players generally stick together. It is particularly important that all players be next to the pedestal when you activate it. Enjoy <3
